transcript_preview: 1.12. Klausies! Atbildi uz jautājumiem. Alen, gribu tevi iepazīstināt ar savu ģimeni. Tā ir mana mamma Olga un tēvs Ivo. Ļoti patīkami ar jums iepazīties. Mana sieva Anna pašreiz ir dārzā. Meita un dēls ir pie saviem draugiem, kas dzīvo kai
translation_preview: Jehovah's Word, 5 / 1 Answer the questions. Allen, I want to introduce you to my family. That's my mom Olga and father Ivo. Nice to meet you. My wife, Anna, is in the garden right now. The daughter and the son are with their neighbors. You'
